description: Extract a 300x300 pixel subframe centered on the cluster core from the full M12 V-band FITS image (~/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/m12_vband.fits) using the coordinates provided in ~/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/extraction_target.txt. Save the extracted subframe to ~/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/output/m12_core_subframe.fits. Generate a statistics report at ~/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/output/extraction_report.txt comparing the full image and the subframe. The report must include dimensions and statistics (mean, standard deviation, minimum, and maximum pixel values) for both images, the extraction coordinates, and the core concentration ratio (calculated as subframe mean divided by full image mean).

metadata.data_source: ESA Hubble FITS Liberator (VLT M12 V-band mosaic)
